text_block_list.name: Monólogo
text_block_list.text:
Today is the day of the NHK Mile Cup.<n>It's a
classic-year G1 that Agnes<n>Digital ran in last year.

text_block_list.name: Agnes Digital
text_block_list.text:
Opera O! Doto! Trainer! Hi, everyone! I<n>have
someone I'd like to show you<n>today!

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text:
What passion! Don't tell me, you're<n>introducing
us to your fiancé?

text_block_list.name: Agnes Digital
text_block_list.text: Bwah! What?! No! It's nothing like<n>that.

text_block_list.name: Agnes Digital
text_block_list.text: Anyway... Shall we head to Tokyo<n>Racecourse?

text_block_list.name: Monólogo
text_block_list.text: The four of us head out to watch the<n>race.

text_block_list.name: Monólogo
text_block_list.text:
When the race begins, we see Agnes<n>Digital
rooting for...

text_block_list.name: Monólogo
text_block_list.text: Wooooo!

text_block_list.name: Caster
text_block_list.text:
Here comes number four, today's<n>favorite! Look
at her go! She's<n>holding down a strong lead, and...

text_block_list.name: Caster
text_block_list.text:
She's won it! A staggering shock<n>from overseas!
I say that the<n>significance of this win makes her a
clear contender to be the face of the<n>Twinkle
Series!

text_block_list.name: Monólogo
text_block_list.text: Wooooo!

text_block_list.name: Agnes Digital
text_block_list.text: Whoooa... Ooohhh...

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text:
A brilliant show and breakout<n>performance by this
new star. She's<n>lacking in neither wits nor
charisma.

text_block_list.name: Meisho Doto
text_block_list.text:
She's so... strong! I can't believe<n>how amazing
that was!

text_block_list.name: Agnes Digital
text_block_list.text:
I knew it! I knew it! I kneeew she<n>was the one!
WoAooGfSjgLl!

text_block_list.name: Agnes Digital
text_block_list.text:
Yup, yup, yup. I called it from the<n>beginning! She's
been popular with<n>the other Uma simps lately too!

text_block_list.name: Agnes Digital
text_block_list.text:
With those looong strides and how<n>she kills it on
every type of track, it's<n>no wonder!

text_block_list.name: Agnes Digital
text_block_list.text:
Not to mention those adorable eyes<n>and long,
slender legs! I just... I just...

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text:
Ha ha ha! You're quite smitten with<n>her, aren't
you?

text_block_list.name: Agnes Digital
text_block_list.text: Absolutely. I mean, she is not likeeveryone else! Ohhh, and to think shejust came and won the very samerace I ran in before... Swoon.

text_block_list.name: Agnes Digital
text_block_list.text:
Kyaaah! It's like my motherly<n>instincts have just
awoken! Do you<n>guys mind if I go shout out some
of<n>this affection?

text_block_list.name: Monólogo
text_block_list.text:
Agnes Digital makes a break for the<n>fence by the
track.

text_block_list.name: Agnes Digital
text_block_list.text:
NUMBER FOOOUR! YOU CAN DO IT!<n>YOU HAVE A
LONG ROAD AHEAD OF<n>YOU, BUT I KNOW YOU CAN
DO IT! I<n>JUST KNOW IT!

text_block_list.name: Agnes Digital
text_block_list.text:
IF EVER YOU FEEL LOST OR IF<n>THINGS GET
HARD, US SENIORS ARE<n>HERE FOR YOU!

text_block_list.name: Monólogo
text_block_list.text:
She yells her heartfelt message at the<n>top of her
lungs.

text_block_list.name: Monólogo
text_block_list.text:
After all, she herself has been<n>through quite a lot
since last year's<n>NHK Mile Cup.

text_block_list.name: Monólogo
text_block_list.text:
She learned about true intensity<n>during T.M. Opera
O and Meisho<n>Doto's first face-off at the
Takarazuka Kinen.

text_block_list.name: Monólogo
text_block_list.text:
Her perspective changed significantly<n>after she
learned about King Halo's<n>first-rate determination
in the Mile<n>Championship.

text_block_list.name: Monólogo
text_block_list.text:
And now today, with the birth of a<n>new generation
of runners, the trail of<n>Umamusume continues on.

text_block_list.name: Agnes Digital
text_block_list.text:
Amaaashing... So preshhhush... I<n>can't believe I'm
actually allowed<n>inside this ring of feels...

text_block_list.name: Agnes Digital
text_block_list.text:
Ohhhhgggh! Hwaaah! It's like my<n>insides have
turned to mush...

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text:
Haaah ha ha! You're possessed by<n>euphoria! But
is it really okay for you<n>to be so at ease?

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text:
If you cannot defeat me and Doto,<n>how can you
inspire the next<n>generation?

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text:
Or, forget about inspiring them, they<n>may
overcome you entirely if you<n>aren't careful. The
Twinkle Series is a<n>stage in which the strongest
actors<n>take the lead.

text_block_list.name: Agnes Digital
text_block_list.text:
Yes... I'm well aware, thank you! And<n>that's
exactly why I want to run<n>better.

text_block_list.name: Agnes Digital
text_block_list.text:
I want to outpace both you and Doto<n>for the sake
of my classic-year cutie.<n>And then...

text_block_list.name: Agnes Digital
text_block_list.text:
After I beat the two of you, I want to<n>welcome her
with a challenge!

text_block_list.name: Meisho Doto
text_block_list.text: After beating—eek! ...Y-y-you're really<n>driven...

text_block_list.name: Meisho Doto
text_block_list.text: That just means I'll—we'll—have totry harder too. I'm looking forward tothis fall.

text_block_list.name: Agnes Digital
text_block_list.text: That's right! Me too!

text_block_list.name: Monólogo
text_block_list.text:
The chaser is now the chased. With<n>this extended
cast of actors, the<n>Twinkle Series has become an
even<n>more colorful spectacle.
